# [BlitzStars](https://www.blitzstars.com/)

Detailed player & tank statistics for World of Tanks: Blitz

![](https://www.blitzstars.com/assets/images/89e5a694.blitzstars-supporter.jpg) Become a BlitzStars Supporter! Go ad-free + more [**More info**](https://www.blitzstars.com/supporters)

[![apple pay](https://www.blitzstars.com/assets/images/4b3641c9.support-apay.svg)![google pay](https://www.blitzstars.com/assets/images/fc25f36a.support-gpay.svg)![credit and debit cards](https://www.blitzstars.com/assets/images/bdadb6f2.support-cards.png)](https://www.blitzstars.com/supporters?payment)

## Zeitgeist Pro only compatible with screens wider than 767 pixels.

This page is only available to supporters.

It shows a _'Pro'_ version of the Zeitgeist available on the homepage, but with the ability to show all tanks tier V and above, with custom sorting and filtering (ie. show just tier VIII heavies). It also shows a couple of charts related to how much particular tanks / types / tiers / etc are played.

Please see the [Supporters Page](https://www.blitzstars.com/supporters) for more details.

## Contact

Bugs? Feature requests? Feedback? You can contact BlitzStars in the following ways:

- On the official WoT: Blitz forums ( [EU](http://forum.wotblitz.eu/index.php?/topic/16777-blitzstars-beta/unread/) [NA](http://forum.wotblitz.com/index.php?/topic/32137-blitzstarscom-beta/unread/) [Asia](http://forum.wotblitz.asia/index.php?/topic/6149-blitzstarscom/unread/))
- By email - SockRobber at BlitzStars.com

## Support BlitzStars

BlitzStars.com development time and server costs come completely out of my own pocket. If you appreciate BlitzStars, and are in a position to support, please see the [**supporters page**](https://www.blitzstars.com/supporters) for more details about becoming a supporter.

If you would like to be a clan supporter please contact me for details. Note that there are limited clan supporter slots. More details are on the [**supporters page**](https://www.blitzstars.com/supporters).
